sections.heading: Clinical Note
sections.section_value:
Chief Complaint
Routine check-up
History of Present Illness
Patient presents for a routine check-up. She reports no current complaints. She denies any recent trauma. She reports feeling well.
Findings
Physical exam: BP 120/80, HR 72, regular. Lungs clear to auscultation. No edema. Neurologic exam intact.
Assessment
Healthy 62-year-old female.
Plan
Continue routine monitoring.
